languages.text: "Ваше вторжение в мою лабораторию было вопиюще бесцеремонным, пусть и весьма своевременным. Впрочем, едва ли я могу винить культ Кровавой паутины в неуважении к таинствам Познания — пусть за загубленные образцы будут в ответе те, кто стал истинными виновниками этого... всплеска энтропии".

"Your invasion of my laboratory was utterly presumptuous, though very timely. However, I can hardly blame the Cult of the Bloodspun Web for disrespecting the mysteries of Knowledge — let those responsible for the ruined specimens be held accountable for this... surge of entropy."
languages.original_text: "Ваше вторжение в мою лабораторию было вопиюще бесцеремонным, пусть и весьма своевременным. Впрочем, едва ли я могу винить культ Кровавой паутины в неуважении к таинствам Познания — пусть за загубленные образцы будут в ответе те, кто стал истинными виновниками этого... всплеска энтропии".

However, I can hardly blame the Cult of the Bloodspun Web for disrespecting the mysteries of Knowledge — let those responsible for the ruined specimens be held accountable for this... surge of entropy."

"Your invasion of my laboratory was utterly presumptuous, though very timely. However, I can hardly blame the Cult of the Bloodspun Web for disrespecting the mysteries of Knowledge — let those responsible for the ruined specimens be held accountable for this... surge of entropy."

languages.text: «Esta invasión de mi laboratorio ha sido presuntuosa, pero puntual. Sin embargo, no puedo juzgar al culto de la Red Sanguinolenta por su falta de respeto hacia los misterios del conocimiento. Que los culpables de la pérdida de especímenes se responsabilicen de este... aumento de entropía».
languages.original_text: "Your invasion of my laboratory was utterly presumptuous, though very timely. However, I can hardly blame the Cult of the Bloodspun Web for disrespecting the mysteries of Knowledge — let those responsible for the ruined specimens be held accountable for this... surge of entropy."

traits.locale_text: «Esta invasión de mi laboratorio ha sido presuntuosa, pero puntual. Sin embargo, no puedo juzgar al culto de la Red Sanguinolenta por su falta de respeto hacia los misterios del conocimiento. Que los culpables de la pérdida de especímenes se responsabilicen de este... aumento de entropía.

languages.text: “你竟敢闯入我的实验室，真是狂妄至极，虽然时机正好。不过，我本就不指望织血罗网能够尊重知识的奥秘。就让那些毁掉实验样本之人为这场……熵增灾难，付出代价吧。”
languages.original_text: "Your invasion of my laboratory was utterly presumptuous, though very timely. However, I can hardly blame the Cult of the Bloodspun Web for disrespecting the mysteries of Knowledge — let those responsible for the ruined specimens be held accountable for this... surge of entropy."

traits.locale_text: “你竟敢闯入我的实验室，真是狂妄至极，虽然时机正好。不过，我本就不指望织血罗网能够尊重知识的奥秘。就让那些毁掉实验样本之人为这场……熵增灾难，付出代价吧。”

languages.text: « Votre irruption dans mon laboratoire était hautement présomptueuse, mais fort à propos. Cependant, je ne peux guère blâmer le culte de la Toile de Sang pour son manque de respect envers les mystères de la connaissance. Que les responsables des spécimens détruits soient punis pour cette... hausse d'entropie. »
languages.original_text: "Your invasion of my laboratory was utterly presumptuous, though very timely. However, I can hardly blame the Cult of the Bloodspun Web for disrespecting the mysteries of Knowledge — let those responsible for the ruined specimens be held accountable for this... surge of entropy."

traits.locale_text: « Votre irruption dans mon laboratoire était hautement présomptueuse, mais fort à propos. Cependant, je ne peux guère blâmer le culte de la Toile de Sang pour son manque de respect envers les mystères de la connaissance. Que les responsables des spécimens détruits soient punis pour cette... hausse d'entropie. »

languages.text: "Laboratuvarımı işgal etmeniz son derece küstahça olsa da çok da zamanındaydı. Yine de İrfan'ın gizemlerine saygısızlık ettikleri için Kanipi Ağı Tarikatı'nı suçlayamam. Harap olan numunelerin sorumluları, bu... Entropi dalgasının hesabını versin."
languages.original_text: "Your invasion of my laboratory was utterly presumptuous, though very timely. However, I can hardly blame the Cult of the Bloodspun Web for disrespecting the mysteries of Knowledge — let those responsible for the ruined specimens be held accountable for this... surge of entropy."

traits.locale_text: "Laboratuvarımı işgal etmeniz son derece küstahça olsa da çok da zamanındaydı. Yine de İrfan'ın gizemlerine saygısızlık ettikleri için Kanipi Ağı Tarikatı'nı suçlayamam. Harap olan numunelerin sorumluları, bu... Entropi dalgasının hesabını versin."

languages.text: 「あなたが私の研究室に踏み込んだのは実に厚かましい振る舞いでしたが、まことに時宜を得てもいました。とはいえ、知識の神秘を軽んじたとして血紡ぎの蜘蛛網教団を責めることは、私にはできかねます――損なわれた標本に責任のある者たちには、この……エントロピーの急増の責めを負わせるべきでしょう」
languages.original_text: "Your invasion of my laboratory was utterly presumptuous, though very timely. However, I can hardly blame the Cult of the Bloodspun Web for disrespecting the mysteries of Knowledge — let those responsible for the ruined specimens be held accountable for this... surge of entropy."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたが私の研究室に踏み込んだのは実に厚かましい振る舞いでしたが、まことに時宜を得てもいました。とはいえ、知識の神秘を軽んじたとして血紡ぎの蜘蛛網教団を責めることは、私にはできかねます――損なわれた標本に責任のある者たちには、この……エントロピーの急増の責めを負わせるべきでしょう」

languages.text: "Eure anmaßende Invasion meines Labors kam immerhin zum rechten Zeitpunkt. Ich kann den Kult des blutgesponnenen Netzes aber wohl kaum die Missachtung der Mysterien des Wissens vorwerfen ... wir sollten die Verantwortlichen der ruinierten Exemplare für diese ... Woge der Entropie zur Rechenschaft ziehen."
languages.original_text: "Your invasion of my laboratory was utterly presumptuous, though very timely. However, I can hardly blame the Cult of the Bloodspun Web for disrespecting the mysteries of Knowledge — let those responsible for the ruined specimens be held accountable for this... surge of entropy."

traits.locale_text: "Eure anmaßende Invasion meines Labors kam immerhin zum rechten Zeitpunkt. Ich kann den Kult des blutgesponnenen Netzes aber wohl kaum die Missachtung der Mysterien des Wissens vorwerfen ... wir sollten die Verantwortlichen der ruinierten Exemplare für diese ... Woge der Entropie zur Rechenschaft ziehen."
